## Summary

<!-- One-sentence description of what you want -->

## Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? What attack scenario does it enable? -->

## Proposed Implementation

<!-- How should this work? CLI flags, expected output, algorithm notes -->

```bash
# Example usage of the proposed feature
sshcrack -k id_ed25519 -w rockyou.txt --new-flag value
```

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What workarounds exist today? Why aren't they sufficient? -->

## Priority

- [ ] Critical (blocking active engagement)
- [ ] High (significant speedup / major feature gap)
- [ ] Medium (quality of life improvement)
- [ ] Low (nice to have)

## Willing to Contribute PR?

- [ ] Yes — I can implement this
- [ ] Partial — I can implement parts of it
- [ ] No — requesting implementation
